personal.name: Shashi Kumar Singh
personal.title: Lead DevOps Engineer | Platform Architect | Site Reliability Engineering Leader
personal.tagline: Designing scalable cloud infrastructure, developer platforms, and resilient distributed systems.

summary: Senior DevOps and Platform Engineering leader with over 7 years of experience designing scalable cloud infrastructure, Kubernetes platforms, and automated CI/CD systems. Proven track record of building Internal Developer Platforms, implementing GitOps workflows, and leading DevOps teams delivering highly reliable distributed systems across multi-cloud environments including AWS, GCP and Azure.

responsibilities: Led a cross-functional team of 8 DevOps and SRE engineers delivering enterprise cloud platform capabilities.
Architected Internal Developer Platform enabling self-service infrastructure provisioning.
Reduced developer environment provisioning time by 90% using automation.
Designed hybrid multi-cloud infrastructure across AWS and GCP supporting high traffic workloads.
Implemented self-healing infrastructure automation improving platform uptime to 99.99%.
Established architecture standards for scalable microservices infrastructure.
Led migration of legacy financial systems to Kubernetes based microservices architecture.
Designed secure CI/CD pipelines compliant with PCI-DSS security standards.
Implemented automated disaster recovery strategies ensuring business continuity.
Improved deployment reliability through containerization and Infrastructure as Code.
Developed automation workflows using Python and Ansible.
Managed Linux server infrastructure supporting enterprise applications.
Automated configuration management improving operational efficiency.

projects.name: Enterprise Internal Developer Platform
projects.description: Designed centralized developer platform providing self-service infrastructure provisioning for engineering teams.

projects.name: Hybrid Multi-Cloud Landing Zone
projects.description: Architected secure landing zone with governance policies and automated infrastructure provisioning.
projects.impact: Enabled scalable multi-region infrastructure across AWS and GCP.

projects.name: Enterprise Observability Platform
projects.description: Designed monitoring and observability platform implementing SLIs, SLOs and logging standards.

projects.name: GitOps CI/CD Transformation
projects.description: Implemented automated GitOps pipelines enabling push-to-deploy workflows.

achievements: Leadership Excellence Award at Adidas for successful data center migration.
Architectural Innovation Award for designing self-service cloud platform.
Reliability Champion for improving uptime to 99.999%.
Mentored junior engineers to technical leadership roles.
